zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD处于低位震荡上行结构，价格稳守6.63支撑上方，短线多头略占优势，但动能有限，未形成强突破。短线谨慎看多

技术指标显示MACD为0.0577维持正值，短期动能偏多；价格运行在SMA20(6.55)上方，趋势结构保持修复状态延续中

支撑位关注6.63及6.55（SMA20）区域，上方阻力在6.69及6.70附近，若突破则有望测试6.75短线目标关注波动

操作建议偏短线震荡交易为主，回踩6.63附近可分批布局多单，跌破6.55需止损观望，避免追高控制仓位风险谨慎操作为宜短线为主

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a mild consolidation phase with a slight upward bias after stabilizing above its short-term moving average. Price action around 6.68 shows buyers maintaining control, but momentum remains limited due to a tight intraday range. The market structure suggests a gradual recovery attempt following prior weakness, with higher lows forming but lacking strong breakout confirmation. Overall, the trend is neutral-to-bullish in the very short term, with price attempting to build acceptance above recent equilibrium levels.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously constructive picture. Trading above the 20-day SMA at 6.553 reinforces short-term bullish alignment, indicating buyers have regained control of the immediate trend. The MACD reading of 0.0577 supports positive momentum, though the lack of a signal line limits confirmation strength and makes trend acceleration uncertain. With RSI unavailable, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed, so interpretation leans heavily on moving average positioning and MACD behavior for directional bias.

Immediate support is observed at the intraday low near 6.6325, followed by a stronger cushion around the 6.55 SMA20 level, which acts as a key dynamic support zone. A deeper decline could expose the 6.50 psychological area, where demand may re-emerge. On the upside, resistance is defined at the recent high of 6.6947, with a breakout potentially opening room toward 6.75 and later the 7.00 region if momentum expands beyond current compression.

Given the range-bound structure, traders may prefer breakout-focused setups rather than aggressive directional positioning. Long exposure becomes more attractive on sustained moves above 6.70 with clear strength, targeting extensions toward higher resistance zones. Conversely, failure to hold 6.63 would suggest short-term weakness and possible rotation back toward the SMA support area. Tight risk management is essential due to compressed volatility and incomplete momentum confirmation.
